NKJV.1: Praise the LORD! Blessed is the man who fears the LORD, Who delights greatly in His commandments.
NKJV.2: His descendants will be mighty on earth; The generation of the upright will be blessed.
NKJV.3: Wealth and riches will be in his house, And his righteousness endures forever.
NKJV.4: Unto the upright there arises light in the darkness; He is gracious, and full of compassion, and righteous.
NKJV.5: A good man deals graciously and lends; He will guide his affairs with discretion.
NKJV.6: Surely he will never be shaken;  The righteous will be in everlasting remembrance.
NKJV.7: He will not be afraid of evil tidings; His heart is steadfast, trusting in the LORD.
NKJV.8: His heart is established; He will not be afraid, Until he sees his desire upon his enemies.
NKJV.9: He has dispersed abroad, He has given to the poor; His righteousness endures forever; His horn will be exalted with honor.
NKJV.10: The wicked will see it and be grieved; He will gnash his teeth and melt away; The desire of the wicked shall perish.

ESV.1: Praise the LORD! Blessed is the man who fears the LORD, who greatly delights in his commandments!
ESV.2: His offspring will be mighty in the land; the generation of the upright will be blessed.
ESV.3: Wealth and riches are in his house, and his righteousness endures forever.
ESV.4: Light dawns in the darkness for the upright; he is gracious, merciful, and righteous.
ESV.5: It is well with the man who deals generously and lends; who conducts his affairs with justice.
ESV.6: For the righteous will never be moved; he will be remembered forever.
ESV.7: He is not afraid of bad news; his heart is firm, trusting in the LORD.
ESV.8: His heart is steady;  he will not be afraid, until he looks in triumph on his adversaries.
ESV.9: He has distributed freely; he has given to the poor; his righteousness endures forever; his horn is exalted in honor.
ESV.10: The wicked man sees it and is angry; he gnashes his teeth and melts away; the desire of the wicked will perish!

NASB.1: Praise the LORD! How blessed is the man who fears the LORD, Who greatly delights in His commandments.
NASB.2: His descendants will be mighty on earth; The generation of the upright will be blessed.
NASB.3: Wealth and riches are in his house, And his righteousness endures forever.
NASB.4: Light arises in the darkness for the upright; [He is] gracious and compassionate and righteous.
NASB.5: It is well with the man who is gracious and lends; He will maintain his cause in judgment.
NASB.6: For he will never be shaken; The righteous will be remembered forever.
NASB.7: He will not fear evil tidings; His heart is steadfast, trusting in the LORD.
NASB.8: His heart is upheld, he will not fear, Until he looks [with satisfaction] on his adversaries.
NASB.9: He has given freely to the poor, His righteousness endures forever; His horn will be exalted in honor.
NASB.10: The wicked will see it and be vexed, He will gnash his teeth and melt away; The desire of the wicked will perish.

NLT.1:
Praise the LORD!
How joyful are those who fear the LORD
and delight in obeying his commands.
NLT.2:
Their children will be successful everywhere;
an entire generation of godly people will be blessed.
NLT.3:
They themselves will be wealthy,
and their good deeds will last forever.
NLT.4:
Light shines in the darkness for the godly.
They are generous, compassionate, and righteous.
NLT.5:
Good comes to those who lend money generously
and conduct their business fairly.
NLT.6:
Such people will not be overcome by evil.
Those who are righteous will be long remembered.
NLT.7:
They do not fear bad news;
they confidently trust the LORD to care for them.
NLT.8:
They are confident and fearless
and can face their foes triumphantly.
NLT.9:
They share freely and give generously to those in need.
Their good deeds will be remembered forever.
They will have influence and honor.
NLT.10:
The wicked will see this and be infuriated.
They will grind their teeth in anger;
they will slink away, their hopes thwarted.

WEB.1: Praise Yah!  Blessed is the man who fears Yahweh, who delights greatly in his commandments.
WEB.2: His offspring  will be mighty in the land. The generation of the upright will be blessed.
WEB.3: Wealth and riches are in his house. His righteousness endures forever.
WEB.4: Light dawns in the darkness for the upright, gracious, merciful, and righteous.
WEB.5: It is well with the man who deals graciously and lends. He will maintain his cause in judgment.
WEB.6: For he will never be shaken. The righteous will be remembered forever.
WEB.7: He will not be afraid of evil news. His heart is steadfast, trusting in Yahweh.
WEB.8: His heart is established. He will not be afraid in the end when he sees his adversaries.
WEB.9: He has dispersed, he has given to the poor. His righteousness endures forever. His horn will be exalted with honor.
WEB.10: The wicked will see it, and be grieved. He shall gnash with his teeth, and melt away. The desire of the wicked will perish.

CSB17.1:
Hallelujah! [1]
Happy is the person who fears the LORD,
taking great delight in his commands. ⓜ
CSB17.2:
His descendants will be powerful in the land;
the generation of the upright will be blessed. ⓝ
CSB17.3:
Wealth and riches are in his house, ⓐ
and his righteousness endures forever. ⓑ
CSB17.4:
Light shines in the darkness for the upright. ⓒ
He is gracious, compassionate, and righteous. ⓓ
CSB17.5:
Good will come to the one who lends generously
and conducts his business fairly. ⓔ
CSB17.6:
He will never be shaken. ⓕ
The righteous one will be remembered forever. ⓖ
CSB17.7:
He will not fear bad news;
his heart is confident, trusting in the LORD. ⓗ
CSB17.8:
His heart is assured; he will not fear. ⓘ
In the end he will look in triumph on his foes. ⓙ
CSB17.9:

his righteousness endures forever. ⓚ

The wicked one will see it and be angry;
he will gnash his teeth in despair. ⓜ

AMP.1:
Praise the LORD! (Hallelujah!)
Blessed [fortunate, prosperous, and favored by God] is the man who fears the LORD [with awe-inspired reverence and worships Him with obedience],
Who delights greatly in His commandments.
AMP.2:
His descendants will be mighty on earth;
The generation of the upright will be blessed.
AMP.3:
Wealth and riches are in his house,
And his righteousness endures forever.
AMP.4:
Light arises in the darkness for the upright;
He is gracious and compassionate and righteous (upright—in right standing with God).
AMP.5:
It is well with the man who is gracious and lends;
He conducts his affairs with justice.
AMP.6:
He will never be shaken;
The righteous will be remembered forever.
AMP.7:
He will not fear bad news;
His heart is steadfast, trusting [confidently relying on and believing] in the LORD.
AMP.8:
His heart is upheld, he will not fear
While he looks [with satisfaction] on his adversaries.
AMP.9:
He has given freely to the poor;
His righteousness endures forever;
His horn will be exalted in honor.
AMP.10:
The wicked will see it and be angered,
He will gnash his teeth and melt away [in despair and death];
The desire of the wicked will perish and come to nothing.

MSG.1:
Hallelujah!
Blessed man, blessed woman, who fear God,
Who cherish and relish his commandments,
MSG.2:
Their children robust on the earth,
And the homes of the upright—how blessed!
MSG.3:
Their houses brim with wealth
And a generosity that never runs dry.
MSG.4:
Sunrise breaks through the darkness for good people—
God's grace and mercy and justice!
MSG.5: The good person is generous and lends lavishly;
MSG.6:
No shuffling or stumbling around for this one,
But a sterling and solid and lasting reputation.
MSG.7:
Unfazed by rumor and gossip,
Heart ready, trusting in God,
MSG.8:
Spirit firm, unperturbed,
Ever blessed, relaxed among enemies,
MSG.9:
They lavish gifts on the poor—
A generosity that goes on, and on, and on.
An honored life! A beautiful life!
MSG.10:
Someone wicked takes one look and rages,
Blusters away but ends up speechless.
There's nothing to the dreams of the wicked. Nothing.

NIV.1:
Psalm 112
Praise the Lord.
Blessed is the man who fears the Lord,
who finds great delight in his commands.
NIV.2:
His children will be mighty in the land;
the generation of the upright will be blessed.
NIV.3:
Wealth and riches are in his house,
and his righteousness endures forever.
NIV.4:
Even in darkness light dawns for the upright,
for the gracious and compassionate and righteous man.
NIV.5:
Good will come to him who is generous and lends freely,
who conducts his affairs with justice.
NIV.6:
Surely he will never be shaken;
a righteous man will be remembered forever.
NIV.7:
He will have no fear of bad news;
his heart is steadfast, trusting in the Lord.
NIV.8:
His heart is secure, he will have no fear;
in the end he will look in triumph on his foes.
NIV.9:
He has scattered abroad his gifts to the poor,
his righteousness endures forever;
his horn will be lifted high in honor.
NIV.10:
The wicked man will see and be vexed,
he will gnash his teeth and waste away;
the longings of the wicked will come to nothing.

NRSVCE.1:
Praise the LORD!
Happy are those who fear the LORD,
who greatly delight in his commandments.
NRSVCE.2:
Their descendants will be mighty in the land;
the generation of the upright will be blessed.
NRSVCE.3:
Wealth and riches are in their houses,
and their righteousness endures forever.
NRSVCE.4:
They rise in the darkness as a light for the upright;
they are gracious, merciful, and righteous.
NRSVCE.5:
It is well with those who deal generously and lend,
who conduct their affairs with justice.
NRSVCE.6:
For the righteous will never be moved;
they will be remembered forever.
NRSVCE.7:
They are not afraid of evil tidings;
their hearts are firm, secure in the LORD.
NRSVCE.8:
Their hearts are steady, they will not be afraid;
in the end they will look in triumph on their foes.
NRSVCE.9:
They have distributed freely, they have given to the poor;
their righteousness endures forever;
their horn is exalted in honor.
NRSVCE.10:
The wicked see it and are angry;
they gnash their teeth and melt away;
the desire of the wicked comes to nothing.

NET.1: Praise the LORD! How blessed is the one who obeys the LORD, who takes great delight in keeping his commands.
NET.2: His descendants will be powerful on the earth; the godly will be blessed.
NET.3: His house contains wealth and riches; his integrity endures.
NET.4: In the darkness a light shines for the godly, for each one who is merciful, compassionate, and just.
NET.5: It goes well for the one who generously lends money, and conducts his business honestly.
NET.6: For he will never be upended; others will always remember one who is just.
NET.7: He does not fear bad news. He is confident; he trusts in the LORD.
NET.8: His resolve is firm; he will not succumb to fear before he looks in triumph on his enemies.
NET.9: He generously gives to the needy; his integrity endures. He will be vindicated and honored.
NET.10: When the wicked see this, they will worry; they will grind their teeth in frustration and melt away; the desire of the wicked will perish.
